manifest_source: test-fallback (Track-B _manifest.json not delivered before Track-D execution)
pierre_menard_subject_unified: A figure at a threshold, refusing to cross without understanding what they already know. Silhouette only, no visible face, architectural threshold prominent.
model_routing: Default: silhouette+hero -> gpt-image-2 (composition), gesture -> flux-1.1-pro (fine detail). Cross-fallback enabled if either provider fails 3x.
negative_prompt_universal: no swords, no glowing weapons, no fantasy-default tropes, no stock mythic imagery, no anime, no logo overlays, no visible text, no lens flare, no dramatic fire, no generic fantasy art, no purple magical energy
notes: Track-B manifest was not delivered before Track-D ran; pipeline used built-in test manifest covering all 5 panes + PM triptych.
All renders >1.2MB (none in solid-color error range <50KB).
Pipeline is idempotent: re-running skips existing PNGs unless --force.
When Track-B manifest lands, run `npm run render` to fill in the rest of the library — existing renders will be skipped automatically.
